## Comment 1

> Username: robertramey  
> Created_at: 2021-05-31 18:37:42 UTC  
> Url: https://github.com/boostorg/serialization/pull/235#issuecomment-851631191  

I DO mean to commit it.  
  
The "normal" boost practice is to create documentation as a separate "job" which leaves the documentation in some other place. (The boost.org website? who knows.)  I want users of this library in either develop or master to have immediate access to the relevant documentation regardless of whether they are on line or not. That is, the boost serialization library attempts to be self contained.  My personal opinion is the the normal boost way doesn't not serve developers needs well.  
  
Of course this doesn't prevent from boost using it's own method - as it does.  
  
There's no conflict here.

---
